text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's right before the race, and when I walk into the
waiting room...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Phew! There, I'm done warming up! ☆ I nailed my
ceremonial sumo stomp, too!
choice_data_list: You sure look like you're ready to go.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I am! I have to make up for my last race being so
unmiraculous and non-buono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You'd better get ready too! You've gotta prepare
to have a blast at my performance, and to smile
until your face hurts!
